---
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# iotcALB

`iotcALB` supports the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE) process for Indian Ocean albacore tuna (*Thunnus alalunga*), managed by the [Indian Ocean Tuna Commission (IOTC)](https://www.iotc.org).

## Installation

```{r install, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("Blue-Matter/iotcALB")
```
